sourceContext.originPage: Banner Health blog landing page (service-detail-cards-carousel template)
sourceContext.blockPosition: middle (between the featured-articles card grid and the video/article card grids)

contentPattern.structure: section heading + horizontally-scrolling track of article slides (image + category eyebrow + title + date per slide)

suitableFor: carousels of image + heading slides on landing pages
any service-detail-cards-carousel instance that renders a slider
notSuitableFor: tabbed or accordion content (use tabs / accordion)

sourceMarkup.note: Standard Block Collection carousel block. The page-transformer/parser (built later by import-infrastructure) maps each div.text-card-al-carousel-slide to one carousel row: first column = slide image, second column = slide content (eyebrow + title link + date).
